tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
[ch]Cmaj7[/ch]   [ch]D/B[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
  I've always been the one to say the  first goodbye[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                     [ch]D/B[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]
   Had to love and lose a hundred million times[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
  Had to get it wrong to know just what I like[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]     [ch]D/B[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
  Now I'm falling[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
  You say my name like I have never  heard before[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]D/B[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]
  I'm indecisive, but, this time, I    know for sure[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
  I hope I'm not the only one that feels it all[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]     [ch]D/B[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
  Are you falling?[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Centre of attention[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D6[/ch]                            [ch]Bm7[/ch]
You know you can get whatever you want from me[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D6[/ch]
Whenever you want it, baby[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
It's you in my reflection[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D6[/ch]                                    [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
I'm afraid of all the things it could do to me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B7[/ch]
If I would've known it, baby[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]
I would've stayed at home[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]
'Cause I was doing better alone[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
But when you said, "Hello"[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D/B[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
I knew that was the end of it all[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em7[/ch]
I should've stayed at home[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]F#dim[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]
'Cause now there ain't no letting you go[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]B7[/ch]     [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
Am I falling in love with the one that could break my heart?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]F#dim[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]
  Oh no, I was doing better alone[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
But when you said, "Hello"[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D/B[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
I knew that was the end of it all[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em7[/ch]
I should've stayed at home[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]F#dim[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
'Cause now there ain't no letting you go[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]B7[/ch]          [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
Am I falling in love with the one that could break my heart?[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]
[ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F#dim[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]
  I wonder, when you go, if I stay on your mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                 [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]
  Two can play that game, but you win me   every time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]F#dim[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]
  Everyone before you was a    waste of time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
  Yeah, you got me[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Centre of attention[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D6[/ch]                            [ch]Bm7[/ch]
You know you can get whatever you want from me[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D6[/ch]
Whenever you want it, baby[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
It's you in my reflection[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D6[/ch]                                    [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
I'm afraid of all the things it could do to me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B7[/ch]
If I would've known it, baby[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]
I would've stayed at home[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]F#dim[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]

Am I falling in love with the one that could break my heart?[/tab]
